<!-- generated by QPB v1.5.6 -->
# AGENTS.md — wm-dashboard (Fußball-Wahrscheinlichkeit)

Read this first before touching the code.

## What this is
A daily Python batch pipeline that turns public prediction-market prices (Polymarket, Kalshi),
bookmaker odds (The Odds API), and football stats (Elo, StatsBomb, FBref, ESPN, venue) into
calibrated World-Cup-2026 match probabilities and **conservative expected-value betting
recommendations**, plus a self-contained static dashboard (`docs/index.html`). Entry point:
`python -m src.pipeline.daily_matchday_run`.

## Architecture
- `src/data_sources/*` — one status-tagged client per external source; degrade gracefully.
- `src/model/*` — the math: `features` (Poisson/Dixon-Coles + λ engines), `monte_carlo`,
  `ensemble`, `value_betting`, `data_quality`, `calibration`, `knockout`, `whale_scoring`.
- `src/pipeline/daily_matchday_run.py` — orchestrator.
- Output: `data/snapshots/<ts>.json`, `data/processed/dashboard_data.json`, `memory/*.md`, `docs/index.html`.

## The bar (read quality/QUALITY.md)
This is money-facing: a number labelled "value" must reflect a real edge, an uncertainty band
must mean parameter uncertainty, the calibration scorecard must match the right fixture. Every
defect in the **probability → uncertainty → value-bet** chain is silent. Never weaken a stake
cap, liquidity gate, or correlation cap to make a test pass.

## Before you commit
- Run `python -m pytest quality/test_functional.py tests/test_model.py -q` (must stay green).
- If you touch `monte_carlo`/`value_betting`/`ensemble`, also check `quality/test_regression.py`.

## Known open bugs (quality/BUGS.md — 8 confirmed, none HIGH)
Highest-value to fix: **BUG-002** (MC band measures simulation noise, drives value flags),
**BUG-004** (integer totals push → Under), **BUG-006** (whale exposure mixes shares+USD),
**BUG-001** (latent `simulate` crash for runs<200 → silent match drop). Each has a strict-xfail
regression test in `quality/test_regression.py` and a fix diff in `quality/writeups/`.

## Quality system
Generated by the Quality Playbook (Mode A). See `quality/` — EXPLORATION, REQUIREMENTS, QUALITY,
CONTRACTS, COVERAGE_MATRIX, BUGS, the RUN_* protocols, and `quality/results/` for red-phase logs.
